privileged_info_summary: The task uses a Windows 11 environment running Copper Point of Sale (v3.06), a real retail POS application by NCH Software. The inventory data is synthetic: 12 items organized into 4 categories (Beverages, Snacks, Electronics, Stationery) with 3 items per category. Items are created via PowerShell script with names like 'Coffee Beans 1lb' and prices ranging from $2.99 to $24.99. The task requires importing the CSV file (C:\Users\Docker\Documents\inventory_items.csv) into Copper POS, creating the 4 categories within the application, assigning items to categories, and outputting a summary file with 'Item Name | Category Name' format. All item names and assignments match exactly across the task definition, setup script, and verification logic.
